pages.text: This is Zandi. She has a friend that no one else can see. Some call him her imaginary friend, but Birdy Monster is very real to Zandi.

blocks.text: She has a friend that no one else can see.
Some call him her imaginary friend, but Birdy Monster is very real to Zandi.

pages.text: Zandi and Birdy Monster play together everyday. Sometimes they mix up magic potions that will make you small or tall, or run very fast.

blocks.text: Zandi and Birdy Monster play together everyday.
Sometimes they mix up magic potions that will make you small or tall, or run very fast.

pages.text: Sometimes they climb trees to spy over the garden fence.

blocks.text: Sometimes they climb trees to spy over the garden fence.

pages.text: Sometimes they blow bubbles in the bath like hippos.

blocks.text: Sometimes they blow bubbles in the bath like hippos.

pages.text: Birdy Monster comes from the other side of the moon, where it is always night time.

blocks.text: Birdy Monster comes from the other side of the moon, where it is always night time.

pages.text: When Zandi goes to bed, he glows in the dark so that she doesn’t get scared.

blocks.text: When Zandi goes to bed, he glows in the dark so that she doesn’t get scared.

pages.text: Birdy Monster has travelled everywhere, even to Port Elizabeth to visit Zandi’s Gogo Adeline.

blocks.text: Birdy Monster has travelled everywhere, even to Port Elizabeth to visit Zandi’s Gogo Adeline.

pages.text: Gogo and Birdy Monster like to play cards together. Gogo also likes to cheat.

blocks.text: Gogo and Birdy Monster like to play cards together.

pages.text: When Birdy Monster goes travelling, he always comes back with the best stories.

blocks.text: When Birdy Monster goes travelling, he always comes back with the best stories.

pages.text: Zandi likes to play with her other friends, too. They can’t see Birdy Monster, but he doesn’t mind. “Come on, Birdy Monster!” shouts Zandi.

blocks.text: Zandi likes to play with her other friends, too. They can’t see Birdy Monster, but he doesn’t mind.

pages.text: “Why is he called Birdy Monster?” Robyn asks. “Because that is his name,” says Zandi.

blocks.text: “Why is he called Birdy Monster?” Robyn asks.
“Because that is his name,” says Zandi.
